titleStmt.title: SII 22.198: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 198. (A.R. No. 198 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE. JAṬ. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA I—19th YEAR (A.D. 1269-70).

summary.p: This also begins with the same introduction Samasta-jagad-ādhāra etc. It is damaged in the middle portion. It registers another endowment of land taxfree by the king, but the extent of the land and the purpose of the gift are lost in the damaged portion. Out of this land one vēli was to be set apart as jīvita for Vikrama-Pāṇḍyaṉ alias Śrī Mūlasthāna-Vēḷān (mentioned in No. 196 above) for a (further) daily supply of 1200 lotus flowers to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ svasti . samasta jagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpurimādhava keraḷavamśani
rmmūlana laṅkādvipaluṇṭhana tvitiyarāma coḷakulaśailakuliśa karṇāṭarāja vidrāvaṇa
kāṭakakarikūṭapākala vividharipudurggamardana virakandaragopāla vipinadāva dahana gaṇapati
hariṇaśārdūla nellūrapuraviracitavirābhiṣeka praṇatarājapratiṣṭhāpaka mahārājā
dhirāja parameśvara śrīsundarapāṇḍyadeva tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ kone riṉmai ko
ṇṭāṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu pattoṉpatāvatu naṭuvilmaṇṭalattu muṭiyūr
nāṭṭu kirāmattu Uṭaiyār pokkaṇaṅkuṭuttaruḷiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Innāyaṉār
yaṉ canti rum paṇikka kalanāṭṭu vaḷantāṉ paṭṭāṉakan nā
nilam puñcai nañcai taṟiyiṟai
kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai maṟṟum kaṭamaiyāl vanta Eppeṟpaṭṭa virutti kaḷum pattoṉpatāvatu Aippaci mātamuta
l tevatāṉayiṟaiyili Ākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭi pāṭāka koṇṭu kallilum cempilum veṭṭik
koṇṭu candrādityavat Aṉupavikkavum vikkirama pāṇṭiyaṉāṉa śrīmulattāṉa veḷāṉ nāḷ Oṉṟukku veḷḷaināṟu tirup
paḷḷittāmam Āyirattu Irunūṟu pū Iṭavum Ivaṉukku civitamāka In nilattile Oru veli nilam Aṭaittuk kuṭukkavum
kaltacca neṉmali Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu niṉaippukkuk kaṭava peruka Uṭaiyāṉ veṇāvuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 22.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
